case_title: THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC VS. MARIO CAMPOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION SERVED SEP-30-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MARIO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 EDDY STREET, #403, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94109, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MARIO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
